_instructions.note: Key = your slip image filename (exact, including extension). Value = array of correct rows.
_instructions.multi_item_slip: One object per item (e.g. 7-Eleven with 3 products = 3 objects).
_instructions.TYPE_confidence: Write the TYPE without the trailing '?' — the scorer ignores it.
_instructions.amounts: Use numbers, not strings. e.g. 50 not '50'.
_instructions.empty_string: Use '' for DESTINATION_ACCOUNT when not a transfer.
_instructions.delete_this_key: Remove this _instructions block before running the harness.
